name: Formal Transportation
registry_source: Virginia SCC (cis.scc.virginia.gov) - no match found via web-indexed search
notes: No SAFER carrier record matches 'Formal Transportation' in VA - the only 'Formal Transportation' in FMCSA is Mr Formal Transportation LLC in Brookpark, OH (not a match). Company is referenced in the 2005 Richmond Area MPO Transportation Operators inventory as a limousine operator at PO Box 18121, Richmond VA 23226, phone 273-0800, indicating likely small livery/limo operator that may not have required interstate USDOT. Virginia SCC entity search did not surface a record in web-indexed results; likely either dissolved, intrastate-only (no USDOT required), or operates under different legal name.

name: Sunflower Transportation
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State (apps.ilsos.gov/businessentitysearch) - not surfaced via web-indexed search
notes: Confirmed existence of Sunflower Transportation LLC at 368 Luella Ave, Calumet City IL 60409, phone (708) 303-8081/629-0486, with Facebook presence (special-needs transportation/FedEx contractor). However, NO SAFER/FMCSA record matches this Calumet City IL entity - the four 'Sunflower Transportation' carriers in FMCSA are in Meade KS (USDOT 2242468), Yuma AZ (2222110), Troutman NC (4115460), and Royal Sunflower Transportation in Emmaus PA. A separate Sunflower Transport LLC (Orlando FL, USDOT 3135094) and another in Cottage Grove MN (4015055) also are not matches. Calumet City entity likely operates intrastate-only without USDOT. Illinois SOS business entity search not retrievable via web search snapshot.

name: Great Bay Chair Car Svc
registry_source: NH Secretary of State (quickstart.sos.nh.gov) - no match found via web-indexed search
notes: No SAFER record matches 'Great Bay Chair Car' anywhere - search for 'GREAT BAY CHAIR CAR' returned no records. SAFER carriers in NH with 'Great Bay' include Great Bay Limousine Inc (USDOT 1252354, Portsmouth NH - 8 power units, 39 drivers, MC-380207, Active, Conditional safety rating 2007) and Great Bay Shuttle Inc (Portsmouth) and Great Bay Logistics LLC (Milford), none at the Somersworth 499 High St address. Note 499 High St in Somersworth NH is also the location of Great Bay Services Inc (a 501c3 disability services nonprofit - greatbayservices.org) - the 'Chair Car Svc' in the source list is likely a paratransit/chair car program operated by or affiliated with Great Bay Services or a related small NH operator; likely intrastate, no USDOT. NH SOS QuickStart was not retrievable via web-indexed snapshot.

name: American Chair Car Svc LLC
carrier_operation: intrastate passenger (non-emergency medical transportation) - holds CT DOT General Livery Permit
registry_source: CT Secretary of State business records search (service.ct.gov/business), cross-referenced with BBB profile (BBB ID 0111-87145977) and CT DOT General Livery Permit Holders list
notes: No SAFER record found for 'American Chair Car' or 'American ChairCar' anywhere - company is intrastate-only NEMT (non-emergency medical transportation) wheelchair-accessible van operator in CT, not subject to USDOT registration. Founded 12/12/1997 per BBB profile; LLC active; principal Luigi Cammarota; address 4154 Madison Ave # 205, Trumbull CT 06611; phone (203) 372-7268. Operates under Connecticut DOT General Livery Permit (CT statewide wheelchair-accessible transportation since 1997). Power units/drivers unknown but firm-size indicators (BBB profile, single location, NEMT scope) suggest small fleet (<15 vehicles).
